channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: RSAC 2026 shipped five agent identity frameworks and left three critical gaps open
item.description: “You can deceive, manipulate, and lie. That’s an inherent property of language. It’s a feature, not a flaw,” CrowdStrike CTO Elia Zaitsev told VentureBeat in an exclusive interview at RSA Conference 2026. If deception is baked into language itself, every vendor trying to secure AI agents by analyzing their intent is chasing a problem that cannot be conclusively solved. Zaitsev is betting on context instead. CrowdStrike’s Falcon sensor walks the process tree on an endpoint and tracks what agents did, not what agents appeared to intend. “Observing actual kinetic actions is a structured, solvable...

item.title: Publicité sur les smartphones Honor : la mauvaise idée qui va braquer les utilisateurs
item.description: Plusieurs utilisateurs européens rapportent l'apparition de publicités intrusives au sein même de l'interface Honor.

item.title: ‘Scream 7’ Comes Home With Deleted Scenes We Hope Will Improve the Movie
item.description: The hit slasher sequel starring Neve Campbell is out digitally on March 31 before a physical release in June.

item.title: I've tried more Nintendo Switch 2 accessories than I can count, but these six are simply the best
item.description: After testing more than 20 Nintendo Switch 2 accessories, these are some of my true favorites.

item.title: What we’re looking for in Startup Battlefield 2026 and how to put your best application forward
item.description: Here's what we're looking for in your Startup Battlefield 200 application and how to make sure your application reflects it.

item.title: A QR Code Too Small to See Hints at a New, Non-Annoying Use for the Format
item.description: Data storage? Yes! A replacement for printed menus? No!

item.title: These are the best USB flash drive deals we found for World Backup Day
item.description: These are the best USB flash drive deals we found for World Backup Day, with savings on our favorite models.

item.title: Your smartphone could get its signal from the sky — thanks to an amazing drone armada that complements traditional cell towers
item.description: Researchers propose a drone-based system that supports mobile networks by improving coverage, reducing delays, and maintaining fresher data during congestion or outages.

item.title: Delve whistleblower strikes again, with alleged receipts about ‘fake compliance’
item.description: Shortly after Delve's founder published a lengthy denial of allegations, while promising changes, the accuser came forward with more alleged details.

item.title: Llama.cpp intègre Google TurboQuant : quels gains pour votre PC ou Mac ?
item.description: L'IA locale a un problème de place, pas seulement de muscle. Avec TurboQuant, Google propose une solution pour faire tenir des contextes énormes dans de petites cartes graphiques.

item.title: Meta is testing an Instagram Plus subscription service with exclusive features
item.description: Meta is testing a new subscription service for Instagram that offers users "exclusive" features like the ability to post Stories for longer than 24 hours. Screenshots promoting "Instagram Plus" have been spotted by users in the Philippines and Mexico in recent days. According to screenshots shared by social media consultant Matt Navarra, a subscription to Instagram Plus comes with a number of Story-focused features not otherwise available to Instagram users. This includes the ability to create multiple "audiences" for Stories posts, see info about who has rewatched your Story, search the list ...

item.title: Amazon’s Spring Sale is basically Black Friday for tech — I found the 55 best deals worth shopping
item.description: Amazon's Spring Sale features stunningly low prices on best-selling tech devices that you'd think it was Black Friday - these are my 55 favorite deals on TVs, smart home, Apple, and more.

item.title: Meta starts testing a premium subscription on Instagram
item.description: Among the premium features on Instagram is the ability to view a Story without the poster seeing that you viewed it and the option to see how many people have rewatched your Story.

item.title: Bluesky’s new AI tool Attie is already the most blocked account other than J.D. Vance
item.description: More than 125,000 Bluesky users have blocked Attie in just a few days, sending a strong message from the user base.

item.title: Andy Weir Apologizes After ‘Star Trek’ Comment Backlash
item.description: 'I don’t like a lot of the new Trek. [Kurtzman], as a person, is a really nice guy. But at the same time, those shows are shit,' the 'Project Hail Mary' writer said in comments on the 'Critical Drinker' podcast.

item.title: Marshals episode 5 is the closest we've seen seen to Yellowstone yet — but it's for the most heatbreaking and disturbing reason
item.description: Marshals episode 5 leaves us on the most harrowing cliffhanger yet — and its echoing Yellowstone in the worst possible way.

item.title: IKEA's candy-colored Easter tableware collection is ultra-sweet for spring
item.description: Pastel-toned crockery, delicate floral table linens and outdoor-friendly lighting to set the mood.

item.title: Our Favorite Amazon Streaming Stick Is Almost Half Off
item.description: The Fire TV Stick 4K Max is great for the Prime Video devout and handles other streaming services just as well.

item.title: OkCupid settles FTC case on alleged misuse of its users' personal data
item.description: Match Group and its subsidiary OkCupid has finally settled a lawsuit with the Federal Trade Commission that dates back to its alleged sharing of user data back in 2014. According to the lawsuit, the FTC accused OkCupid of inappropriately sharing personal user data that includes photos and location info with a third party company, Clarifai, which offers AI-powered software for uses like facial recognition and content moderation. According to the FTC, OkCupid's privacy policy at the time noted that the company wouldn't share a user's personal information with others, except for some cases includ...

item.title: Spring cleaning deals in Amazons Spring Sale: Save on kitchen, bathroom, and laundry supplies before the sale is over
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has deals to deep clean every room: Save on disinfectant sprays, shower scrubbers, vacuums, and more before the sale is over.

item.title: Beats’ gym-friendly Powerbeats Fit are $30 off for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: For iPhone owners, the AirPods Pro 3 are a fantastic all-around set of wireless earbuds, even for working out. Their value is especially tough to beat at $199.99; however, even with five sizes of silicone tips, they aren’t the best fit for some people, or for some kinds of workouts. If earbuds tend to fall […]

item.title: YouTube sur Android Auto : l’annonce que tout le monde attendait
item.description: L'attente est terminée, mais le résultat risque de vous faire grincer des dents. YouTube arrive officiellement sur Android Auto.

item.title: Need a new reusable water bottle? Yeti, Owala, and Stanley are all on sale in the Amazon Spring Sale
item.description: Shop the best deals on reusable water bottles in Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Yeti, Stanley, and Owala are all on sale.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale has projector deals from BenQ, XGIMI, Soundcore Nebula, and more
item.description: Save over 30% on projectors from Anker Nebula, LG, BenQ, and more during Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Scientists Discover Hidden Behavior in Water That Helps Explain Why Ice Floats
item.description: Water exists in two different liquid forms, which might be why it behaves differently than other substances.

item.title: Fannie and Freddie stock prices are soaring today, but still down for the year. Here’s why
item.description: Even after Monday’s surge, both stocks remain sharply lower year-to-date, raising questions about the rally. Shares of mortgage giants Fannie Mae (FNMA) and Freddie Mac (FMCC) saw huge price surges early Monday after hedge fund manager Bill Ackman posted about the two stocks on social media.

item.title: The Nutribullet Pro just hit a record-low price
item.description: Grab the NutriBullet Pro 900W for its lowest price ever during the final hours of Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Deal ends March 31.

item.title: How to watch Germany vs. Ghana online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Germany vs. Ghana in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Les prix des forfaits flambent en 2026, mais cette offre 5G XXL va vous faire changer d’avis
item.description: Envie de beaucoup de data sans faire exploser votre budget en 2026 ? La Poste Mobile frappe fort avec son forfait 5G incluant 250 Go pour seulement 13,99 euros par mois. Une offre qui mérite votre attention, surtout pour les gros consommateurs de data.

item.title: A new RCS update could connect iPhone and Android video calls, someday
item.description: iPhone and Android users might be able to make interoperable video calls through their messaging apps - eventually. Last week, the GSM Association (GSMA) announced that the finalized RCS Universal Profile 4.0 standard will let users turn 1-to-1 or group RCS chats into video calls thanks to a feature called Messaging‑Initiated Video Calls (MIVC). "MIVC […]...

item.title: The best boring (but essential) deals to shop in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: From paper towels to dishwasher pods, here are the best deals on boring but essential household goods during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.
